mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_HOST_PARTITION_DETAIL DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT TIME as time, PARTITION_NAME as partitionName, UTILIZATION as utilization, SIZE as size, USED as used, PARTITION_TYPE as partitionType,MOUNTED_DIR as mountedDir FROM TBL_HOST_PARTITION_DETAIL dpd WHERE dpd.HOST_ID = ${hostId} AND TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_HOST_PARTITION_DETAIL)
